title: Apocalyptic Meteors
description: Adds dynamic falling meteors to your world that explode on impact, ranging from small survival threats to massive, world-ending events.
body:
# Meteors Mod

**So I made a mod that throws meteors at you.**

Basically, rocks spawn randomly around the player and fall from the sky. They aren't just for looks either—they actually blow up, make craters, and set stuff on fire. It leaves obsidian behind too, so it messes up the terrain a bit.

**The Features:**
* **They explode:** You'll see a smoke trail, then a crash. If you're close, you take damage.
* **You control it:** You can set it to be annoying (easy) or a nightmare (hard).

**For Admins (The Fun Part) **
I added a "Destructive" mode specifically for ending a server season or just trolling.
If you run the command, it flashes a huge warning on everyone's screen, spawns a massive meteor at max height, and nukes a **300-block radius**. It kills everything near it instantly. Use responsibly lol.

**How to run it:**
Just type `/meteors easy` (or medium/hard).
If you want the nuke: `/meteors destructive`

**Install:**
NeoForge 1.21.1. Drag and drop into mods. Done.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h8UFQM-K3HM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
